data.title: Here's How Much You Would Have Made Owning ASML Holding Stock In The Last 15 Years
data.description:
ASML Holding (NASDAQ:ASML) has outperformed the market over the past 15 years by 15.63% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 28.07%. Currently, ASML Holding has a market capitalization of $721.95 billion.

Buying $100 In ASML: If an investor had bought $100 of ASML stock 15 years ago, it would be worth $4,055.78 today based on a price of $1860.00 for ASML at the time of writing.

ASML Holding's Performance Over Last 15 Years

Finally -- what's the point of all this? The key insight to take from this article is to note how much of a difference compounded returns can make in your cash growth over a period of time.

This article was generated by Benzinga's automated content engine and reviewed by an editor.
